GovPilot
Terms of Service
Effective date: 26 April 2026  ·  Last updated: 26 April 2026

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of GovPilot, a file-tracking and ministry-clearing application operated by El-Bach's ("we", "us", or "our"). By creating an account or using GovPilot you agree to these Terms in full.

1. Description of Service

GovPilot is a professional tool that helps clearance offices, law firms, notary offices, and government brokers track client files through government ministry pipelines. Features include:

  • File and client management with stage-by-stage tracking
  • Document scanning and storage
  • Financial transaction tracking per file
  • Team collaboration with role-based access control
  • Push notifications for file activity

2. Account Registration

To use GovPilot you must create an account with a valid email address or phone number and a secure password. You are responsible for:

  • Keeping your login credentials confidential.
  • All activity that occurs under your account.
  • Notifying us immediately if you suspect unauthorised access.

You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. Accounts registered on behalf of a business must be created by an authorised representative.

3. Acceptable Use

You agree to use GovPilot only for lawful business purposes. You must not:

  • Upload or share illegal, fraudulent, or defamatory content.
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the app.
  • Use the service to store personal data you are not authorised to process.
  • Interfere with or disrupt the service or its infrastructure.
  • Share your account credentials with users outside your organisation.
  • Use the service in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations.

4. Subscription Plans and Billing

GovPilot offers a Free plan and paid plans (Basic, Premium). Paid plans are activated through direct contact with our team via WhatsApp or email — no automatic in-app billing is processed currently.

  • Plan features and limits are described in the app under Account → Plans.
  • We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice to existing subscribers.
  • Refunds are considered on a case-by-case basis — contact us within 7 days of payment.

5. Data Ownership

Your data belongs to you. We claim no ownership over any client files, documents, financial records, or other content you enter into GovPilot. We process your data solely to provide the service.

You grant us a limited licence to store, display, and transmit your data as necessary to operate the service.

6. Data Security and Availability

We take reasonable technical measures to protect your data, including encrypted storage and Row Level Security policies that isolate each organisation's data. However, no system is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability of the service.

We target best-effort uptime but do not provide an SLA on the Free plan. Paid plans may include uptime commitments communicated at the time of subscription.

7. Account Deletion

You may delete your account at any time from Account → Security → Delete Account within the app. Upon deletion:

  • Your personal profile and authentication account are permanently removed.
  • File and client data associated with your organisation remains accessible to the organisation owner until they choose to delete it.
  • Deleted data cannot be recovered.

Organisation owners must transfer ownership before deleting their account.

8. Termination by Us

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or present a security risk — with or without prior notice depending on severity. We will make reasonable efforts to notify you and preserve your data for a reasonable period where possible.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, El-Bach's shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of GovPilot, including loss of data, loss of revenue, or business interruption.

Our total liability to you for any claim arising out of these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

10. Disclaimer of Warranties

GovPilot is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement. We do not warrant that the service will be error-free or uninterrupted.

11. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms as the service evolves. We will notify users of material changes via push notification or email at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of GovPilot after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Lebanon. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Beirut, Lebanon.

13. Contact Us

For questions about these Terms, billing disputes, or legal notices, contact us at:

Email: hello@govpilot.app

WhatsApp: +961 70 123 456

© 2026 GovPilot · El-Bach's Privacy Policy  ·  Terms of Service
